title: MIAD-684 Misuzu after sunburn
overview: Misuzu, a dental assistant I met on a tropical beach. Even though she has a dry personality, she is a dirty tsundere sister who suddenly changes when it comes to sex. One day when it snowed, I decided to please the slender body that was clearly tanned in Dubai. Please enjoy Misuzu after sunburn, which is the shape of the unpleasant swimsuit itself.
